debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
L : Type u_2
inst✝¹⁵ : Field K
inst✝¹⁴ : Field L
inst✝¹³ : Algebra K L
inst✝¹² : NumberField K
inst✝¹¹ : NumberField L
V : Type u_3
inst✝¹⁰ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝⁹ : Module L V
inst✝⁸ : Module K V
inst✝⁷ : IsScalarTower K L V
inst✝⁶ : FiniteDimensional L V
inst✝⁵ : FiniteDimensional K V
B : Type u_4
inst✝⁴ : Ring B
inst✝³ : Algebra K B
inst✝² : FiniteDimensional K B
inst✝¹ : Module ℚ V
inst✝ : FiniteDimensional ℚ V
φ : V ≃ₗ[ℚ] V
⊢ ∀ᶠ (i : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
    Set.BijOn
      ⇑((fun v =>
            ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv
              (@Aux.continuousBaseChange V inst✝¹⁰ inst✝¹ inst✝ (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.commRing (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v)))
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.instAlgebraAdicCompletion (RingOfIntegers ℚ) ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.uniformSpace
                    (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v))).toTopologicalSpace
                ⋯ φ))
          i)
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝¹⁰ inst✝¹ i)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        i).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝¹⁰ inst✝¹ i)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        i).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range

failed_attempts:
classical
      let b := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
      have h (f : V ≃ₗ[ℚ] V) := Filter.eventually_all.2 fun i ↦ Filter.eventually_all.2 fun j ↦
        IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.eventually_mem_adicCompletionIntegers ℚ (LinearMap.toMatrix b b f.toLinearMap i j)
      filter_upwards [h φ, h φ.symm] with v h1 h2
      exact (c_v_alg V v).toEquiv.bijOn_baseChange_adicCompletionIntegers b φ h1 h2))

filter_upwards [NumberField.eventually_isUnit_det_toMatrix ℚ (Module.Basis.ofVectorSpace ℚ V) φ] with v hv
      exact hv.bijOn_lTensor_adicCompletionIntegers_range _))

have h1 := (IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V).eventually_mapsTo_baseChange φ.toLinearMap
      have h2 := (IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V).eventually_mapsTo_baseChange φ.symm.toLinearMap
      filter_upwards [h1, h2] with v hv1 hv2
      exact Set.BijOn.mk hv1 (continuousBaseChange _ φ).injective
        (fun x hx ↦ ⟨(continuousBaseChange _ φ.symm) x, hv2 hx, (continuousBaseChange _ φ).apply_symm_apply x⟩)))

set f := continuousBaseChange (v.adicCompletion ℚ) φ
      set R := (↑((c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.comp (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
        (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range)
      have hMaps {ψ : V ≃ₗ[ℚ] V} (hψ : ∀ i j, v.valuation (ψ.toMatrix b b i j) ≤ 1) : MapsTo (continuousBaseChange (v.adicCompletion ℚ) ψ) R R := by
        intro x hx; obtain ⟨y, rfl⟩ := hx
        obtain ⟨c, rfl⟩ := (IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V).basisV.lTensor_adicCompletionIntegers_range_eq v y
        simp only [continuousBaseChange, LinearEquiv.baseChange_apply, LinearEquiv.toLinearMap_eq_coe,
          LinearEquiv.coe_coe, Basis.apply_basisV, Basis.sum_repr, TensorProduct.sum_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
        refine Submodule.sum_mem _ (fun i _ ↦ Submodule.sum_mem _ (fun j _ ↦ ?_))
        exact Submodule.smul_mem _ (⟨_, hψ i j⟩ * c i) (Submodule.subset_span ⟨j, rfl⟩)
      exact (hMaps hv).bijOn_of_inverse f.symm (hMaps hvi) (fun x _ ↦ f.left_inv x) (fun x _ ↦ f.right_inv x)))
